title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Melorra Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Melorra Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Melorra Capital India! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Melorra Capital India:
Melorra Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
